## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Optimize bundle size and route-level code splitting
- Improve render performance for dashboard widgets and charts
- Add image/font loading optimizations
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Maintain visual parity with Issue 3 tokens and spacing
  - No layout shifts above acceptable threshold on key routes
  - Skeleton usage for async-heavy sections

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Lighthouse performance target met on key pages
- [ ] Bundle analysis report added
- [ ] Route transitions remain smooth on mobile
- [ ] PR includes before/after performance snapshots

`frontend`, `performance`, `priority-high`
